productDisplayName: Nike Men Solid Off-White Track Pants
description: CompositionOff-white track pants made of 100% polyester, has Dri-Fit fabric to wick sweat away and keep you dry and comfortable, an elasticated waist with drawstring, mesh-lined side pockets and mesh inserts on the back below the waistbandFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursUse mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry cleanAdd some speed to your stride in the nike men's track pants, an ultra-lightweight design that's ready to go that distance with you. With hard-working fabric and ventilation where you need it most, these running pants keep you fresh and comfortable, and help you stay focused on the finish.
